title: Claude Fable 5 is here!
summary: AI Search YouTube channel reviews Claude Fable 5 (also called Claude Mythos 5) and compares it to GPT 5.5. The review demonstrates various capabilities including ray tracing, 3D reconstruction, music composition, chemistry education, and cancer classification, along with performance benchmarks and model specifications.
writeup: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5, running it through tasks that include ray tracing, 3D reconstruction, music composition, and cancer classification. The video sets Fable 5 against GPT 5.5 and walks through benchmarks and model specifications. The takeaway is a capability snapshot across coding, generation, and image classification, with comparative results framing how the two models stack up.
